name: 环境科学
subject: science
domain_name: 科技与社会 / Science & Society / Science & Society
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 2-5 will be able to analyze human impacts (e.g., pollution, deforestation, climate change) on a specific ecosystem and propose scientifically sound mitigation strategies.
Students will be able to evaluate the sustainability of a resource management practice by considering its environmental, economic, and social impacts.
